name: Wholesale Chargeback Pulse
description: Monitors open chargeback windows, expiry dates, and recovery rates across wholesale brands. Extracts cb_total_exposed and cb_recovered_ytd signals.

name: At-Risk Account Monitor
description: Scans accounts by silence duration and reorder gap. Flags accounts approaching churn threshold. Extracts ar_accounts_flagged and ar_total_exposure.

name: Dead Stock Velocity Check
description: Checks aged inventory carry costs and markdown exposure. Identifies stalled styles beyond 180 days. Extracts ds_total_carry and ds_styles_at_risk.

name: Size Curve Drift Detector
description: Compares ordered vs sold size distributions. Surfaces accounts with >10pt imbalance on any size. Extracts sc_margin_exposed and sc_corrections_drafted.

name: PO Timing Risk Sweep
description: Scores active purchase orders for factory on-time risk and delivery window exposure. Extracts po_total_exposure and po_orders_at_risk.

name: Wholesale Market Macro Scan
description: Pulls BLS PPI apparel index, retail bankruptcy filings, and tariff schedule changes. Feeds G-Mode macro intelligence layer.
